# Shopify Developer Platform

Intro paragraph about the platform.

## Apps

Apps overview text.

### Configuration and shopify.app.toml

[Configuration docs](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/cli-for-apps/app-configuration)

The `shopify.app.toml` file describes app capabilities. Use scopes and webhooks.

### Admin API

[Admin API docs](https://shopify.dev/docs/api/admin)

The Admin API lets apps read and write store data via GraphQL.

#### Authentication

[Auth docs](https://shopify.dev/docs/apps/build/authentication-authorization)

Use OAuth and session tokens for authentication.

## Themes

Themes overview text.
